name: Chocolate Mini Cheesecakes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup (half stick) butter or margarine, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F. Line muffin cups (2-1/2 inches in diameter) with paper baking cups or spray with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Press about 1 tablespoonful of chocolate crumb crust mixture into the bottom of each cup.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add cocoa and butter mixture, then sweetened condensed milk, eggs, and vanilla extract. Stir in until combined.
4. Fill muffin cups with batter.
5. Bake for 35 minutes or until set. Cool for 15 minutes, then remove from pan to a wire rack. Allow to cool completely.
6. Before serving, spread chocolate glaze over the cheesecakes. Let set at room temperature.
7. Serve about 24 mini cheesecakes.
Chocolate Crumb Crust:
1-1/2 cups vanilla wafer crumbs
6 tablespoons Hershey's Cocoa
6 tablespoons powdered sugar
6 tablespoons melted butter or margarine
Chocolate Glaze:
2 cups (12 oz.) semi-sweet chocolate chips
1 cup whipping cream
1 teaspoon vanilla extract
